Summarize the following in exactly one sentence: Solar panels convert sunlight directly into electricity using photovoltaic cells made of semiconductor materials like silicon. When sunlight hits these cells, it excites electrons, creating an electric current. Modern residential systems can offset a significant portion of a household's electricity usage, though efficiency varies with panel angle, shading, and local climate.

Summarize the following in exactly one sentence: Coral reefs, though covering less than one percent of the ocean floor, support roughly a quarter of all marine species. Rising ocean temperatures and acidification caused by climate change have led to widespread coral bleaching events, threatening these ecosystems and the coastal communities that depend on them for fishing and tourism.
